title: haworthia pumila subsp. radula
intro: Haworthia pumila subsp. radula is a succulent plant species, commonly known as a dwarf or mini succulent, belonging to the Asphodelaceae family. This plant is known to have medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Haworthia pumila subsp. radula include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made by infusing its leaves in water or oil, and it can also be used topically as a poultice to treat skin conditions.
